title: ArtisticCraft
description: Tired of the same vanilla paints? This mod adds 160+ new paintings and 110 new music discs to your game
body:
[![RubyHost Partnership](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/734de55b9d68de8d0d141c95b975144be608660a_0.webp)](https://billing.rubyhost.net/aff.php?aff=22)

# This mod focuses on adding artistic elements to the game, whether in the form of discs, paintings or blocks.

**Paintings:** A lot of paintings got added, being more than 160 paintings for the game, all of which can be obtained in the vanilla way.

**Discs:** The mod adds 110 new discs. Some of them are Derivakat's songs covers by tastyForReal, T_en_M and Thaetaa-Terraainn minecraft discs ideas. The rest are free music by Keys of the Moon, Uniq, LesFM, Sappheiros, Mozart and Kevin MacLeod.

**Sheets:** Sheets are identical to the corresponding discs in terms of appearance. You can craft specifiic sheets or a random sheet witch will give you a random sheet in the mod.

**Recorder:** Recorder is a new block that serves to transfer the music from the sheet to the disc, it is used with the combination of the sheet to the corresponding music you want and an empty disc.

**GlassCutter:** Right Clicking a grass block will instantly break it dropping it, using on Amethyst Blocks and Amethyst Budding will drop them making amethyst easier to farm.

**Ink Buckets:** A cheaper and easier way to color blocks like concrete, wool, glass, etc... Right-click on a dyeable block with a ink bucket in your hand, can be used 32 times.

### 1.13.2 Below - To get the new discs in survival you have to hold specific items in your second hand, an empty disc in your main hand and right click on a recorder.

### 1.14+ - To get the new discs in survival you have to hold the corresponding sheet to the disc in the off hand, an empty disc in the main hand and right click on a recorder.
 

# Even a fart has art in it.

### I have no plans to carry the mod to any past version of Minecraft or Fabric, if you find a bug please report so i can solve it right away.

### **__Do not install this mod from any other site, it's fake and may contain viruses or unwanted software, i only post mods on Curseforge or Modrinth and always go by the name Ruby.__**

# You can use this mod in your modpack freely.
